skipRules: SKIP SELL when EMA Trend is bullish AND RSI is between 38.00 and 43.00
SKIP SELL when RSI is below 30.00 (indicates exhaustion/reversal risk)
SKIP SELL when EMA Trend is bearish AND RSI is between 34.00 and 37.00
proceedRules: PROCEED SELL when EMA Trend is bearish AND RSI is between 29.00 and 33.99
PROCEED SELL when EMA Trend is bearish AND RSI is between 40.90 and 44.00
corrections: Filter out SELL signals during bullish EMA trends regardless of RSI/MACD
Tighten SELL criteria to prioritize bearish EMA alignment as the primary filter
GBPUSD.summary: The strategy suffers from 'counter-trend' trades; restricting SELL signals exclusively to bearish EMA environments significantly improves win quality.

skipRules: SKIP when EMA Trend is bearish, regardless of RSI value.
SKIP when RSI is between 59.5 and 60.0 AND EMA Trend is bearish.
proceedRules: PROCEED when EMA Trend is bullish AND RSI is between 54.0 and 59.9.
PROCEED when RSI is greater than 54.0 AND EMA Trend is bullish.
corrections: Filter out all BUY signals occurring while the EMA trend is bearish, as these correlate with high loss frequency.
Implement a strict RSI floor of 50.0 for all BUY entries to avoid weak momentum entries.
USDJPY.summary: Strategy performance is heavily dependent on EMA trend alignment; bullish EMA trend is a statistically significant requirement for success.

skipRules: SKIP BUY when MACD is negative AND Price is below EMA20
SKIP SELL when RSI is 40-49 AND MACD is negative AND EMA Trend is bullish
SKIP BUY when RSI is 50-55 AND Price is above EMA20 (frequent small losses observed)
SKIP SELL when RSI is 45-49 AND MACD is positive AND Price is below EMA20
proceedRules: PROCEED SELL when RSI is 50-60 AND MACD is positive AND EMA Trend is bearish AND Price is above EMA20
PROCEED SELL when RSI is 40-50 AND MACD is negative AND EMA Trend is bearish AND Price is below EMA20
corrections: Filter out BUY signals that conflict with EMA Trend direction
Tighten SELL criteria by ensuring MACD and EMA Trend alignment for trend-following entries
XAUUSD.summary: The strategy performs significantly better as a trend-following mean-reversion setup when MACD/EMA alignment is confirmed, while suffering from counter-trend BUY signals.
